query: What do you have by the Universal House of Justice?
response: The library holds 475 documents by the Universal House of Justice, focusing on various aspects of Bahá'í administration and guidance. Among these, the collection includes works like ["Regarding Economic Life"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Administrative/the-five-year-plan-2006-2011-messages-of-the-universal-house-of-justice#p1670) and discussions on ["Climate Change: Policies and Political Discourse"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Administrative/the-five-year-plan-2006-2011-messages-of-the-universal-house-of-justice#p1670). These writings often explore the implications of the Revelation on both ["individual growth"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Administrative/the-five-year-plan-2006-2011-messages-of-the-universal-house-of-justice#p1670) and community development.

query: What Hindu scriptures do you carry?
response: The library holds 127 Hindu texts, including collections like Bhakti and Devotional Works and Epics. Among these, the Bhagavad Gita offers a profound vision where Krishna grants Arjuna ["sense divine"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda) to perceive divine glory. query: How many documents by 'Abdu'l-Bahá do you have, and which ones discuss governance?
response: The library holds 623 documents by 'Abdu'l-Bahá, which include foundational writings that shape the Bahá'í Faith. Among these, the "Core Tablets" collection contains key texts, some of which address governance principles. 'Abdu'l-Bahá's writings often explore themes of justice and administration, emphasizing the importance of ["unity and cooperation"](https://siftersearch.com/document/123) in governance to promote peace and prosperity. If you're interested in specific works discussing governance, I can help point you to relevant texts within this collection.
